products.title: JAX
products.description: As homage to the mid-20th century's art elite, allow these vintage 50s-style frames to guide your search for the meaningful Abstract of every Expression. Fire up your independence, forge a fresh perspective, and boldly paint the canvas of your life.

products.title: BIBA LONDON BOUTIQUE, LOGO PLAYING CARD, c. 1967
WELCOME TO BIG BIBA, CATALOG, c. 1970s
GRANDFUNK
products.description: You don't need a whole lot of money or a big fine car to run around town and stay out all night, to fill hearts with desire or set souls on fire. You were born alright, you're still clean out of sight, and you'll always be some kind of wonderful.

products.title: BARCLAY
products.description: Whether enjoying the spray of the Pacific surf or awaking to the early sun of the Serengeti, these super-sculptural pilots with deep teardrop lenses provide VIP access to spectacles as beautiful as they are bombastic – a total Betty!

products.title: ZEPHIRIN 47 CLIP ON 2
products.description: Inspired by big thinkers and ambitious outcasts, the ZEPHIRIN (named after Pope Zephyrinus) is notable for its distinctive pre-WWII sizing, meticulous hand-finish, and sculpted temple construction. With its slim lines and eclectic silhouette, these spectacles are perfect for everyday use by the cultural aesthete, imbuing the wearer with the panache of a professor and the swagger of a saint.

products.title: ZEPHIRIN CLIP ON 2
products.description: Inspired by big thinkers and ambitious outcasts, the ZEPHIRIN (named after Pope Zephyrinus) is notable for its distinctive pre-WWII sizing, meticulous hand-finish, and sculpted temple construction. With its slim lines and eclectic silhouette, these spectacles are perfect for everyday use by the cultural aesthete, imbuing the wearer with the panache of a professor and the swagger of a saint.

products.title: SHERIDAN
products.description: The ruggedness of the Western frontier meets the elegance of the Victorian age in these sturdy, refined spectacles that feature our custom mono-block hinge adorned with Art Deco hairline details and contrast color rivets.

products.title: ELSA PERETTI FOR TIFFANY & CO., BONE CUFF
ELSA PERETTI FOR TIFFANY & CO., THUMBPRINT DISH, c. 1980
ELSA PERETTI FOR TIFFANY & CO., BOTTLE PENDANT
NOVA MAGAZINE, JOHN LENON & YOKO ONO, MARCH 1969
BELVEDERE
products.description: Though you narrow your field of vision your breadth of understanding deepens, like a small door opening into a great expanse. Moving beyond what’s expected, believing not in happenstance—you seek the reveal, you lift the veil, you take the chance.

products.title: BELVEDERE
products.description: Though you narrow your field of vision your breadth of understanding deepens, like a small door opening into a great expanse. Moving beyond what’s expected, believing not in happenstance—you seek the reveal, you lift the veil, you take a chance.

products.title: DAKOTA
products.description: Ride across the unnamed territories of your rambling heart and you might just discover thereâ€™s gold in them thar hills, and vast open ranges where you can plant the seeds of raw intuition. Trust what your amblings bring to fruition, and reap the unforeseen harvests of your wildest visions.

products.title: STERETT
products.description: Get a saddle on the situation in steadfast spectacles that confront the dangers with the debonair. Handcrafted with exquisite precious metal adornments that harken back to the ornate silversmithing of the Old West, these are forward-looking frames that can’t help but range free.

products.title: ELSA PERETTI FOR TIFFANY & CO., FOLD CUFF, 1978
NADJA
products.description: The memory of the runway’s return to Hollywood glamor in the mid-‘90s animates these alluring cat-eyes inspired by the heyday of the catwalk, evoking an era in which NYC was the epicenter of fashion and supermodels ruled the world.

products.title: SHOZO

An exercise in utility? Perhaps. As if to say, Ã¢â‚¬Å“herein lies the materials of art, the clarity of creative destruction. Appraise the present before its filled with holes.Ã¢â‚¬ 

products.title: YVES
products.description: Classic, with soft angles and notable volumes, flaunt your innate ferocity and rebel spirit in limited-edition glasses inspired by the celebrated French couturiers working at the height of the super ‘70s.

products.title: ASHCROFT
products.description: Break your mold with this winning composition of impeccable lines and poetic reliefs. An urban hymn full of bright chords emanating from across the pond, these limited-edition glasses are a grandiose toast to the bittersweet symphonies of the Nineties.

products.title: TEST
products.description: CLOUDINARY TEST - VH

products.title: MONARCH
products.description: Set adrift on memory's bliss in limited-edition spectacles born upon a luxuriant breeze, butterfly-shaped beauties sleekly contoured and sumptuously sculpted, an organic expression aflutter with subtle eccentricity and awe-inspiring elegance.

products.title: DOMOTO
products.description: Oversized but never overconfident, the T.V.-shaped lenses of these splashy spectacles project nothing if not talent, taste, and tenacity, a studious mÃƒÂ©lange of luxuriant materials and refined physicality that conveys the same vibrancy as the powerful abstract paintings of Japanese artist Domoto Hisao.

products.title: INITIALS
products.description: Slender and assertive, allow these limited-edition glasses inspired by those worn in the '60s by Brigitte Bardot (aka "B.B.") to help lead you to the grand loves of your life and approach this enchanted age full of serendipity and slim chances with tenderness and tenacity.

products.title: OATMAN
products.description: Step out and into the rugged wilderness and rich history of limited-edition glasses fashioned with frontier ingenuity and mid-century flair. Modern heirlooms, these rimless renditions are sophisticated, streamlined, and full of minimalist charm.

products.title: ZEPHIRIN 47
products.description: Inspired by big thinkers and ambitious outcasts, the ZEPHIRIN (named after Pope Zephyrinus) is notable for its distinctive pre-WWII sizing, meticulous hand-finish, and sculpted temple construction. With its slim lines and eclectic silhouette, these spectacles are perfect for everyday use by the cultural aesthete, imbuing the wearer with the panache of a professor and the swagger of a saint.

products.title: MOLINO 55
products.description: Named after Carlo Mollino, one of the great architects and designers of the 20th century, the Molino's decisive rectangular shape emulates the acclaimed Italian's flair for poetic angularity, while the spectacle's solid construction and subtle bevel detailing reflect his astute mix of sensuality and balance.

products.title: MOLINO
products.description: The shape of rebellious sophistication, these distinctive ‘60s-inspired spectacles are an astute mix of volume and balance, a handcrafted heirloom of impeccable construction and subtle bevel detailing that demonstrates a flair for the sensual and poetic.

products.title: HANDMADE SPURS WITH BOOT STRAPS, c. 19th century

EICHLER
products.description: Strong, feminine, and geometric, these limited-edition spectacles with a small fit feature custom ball hinges, ‘Lever’ wirecores, and our signature polished metal details.

products.title: NATRONA BRACELET
products.description: Sturdy and sophisticated, designed with a Southwest sensibility, the Natrona Bracelet is a limited-edition expression of the classic arrowhead motif, handcrafted in sterling silver or 18k gold and replete with Art Deco subtlety, including our signature hairline engraved details, a startling 11mm cabochon of bloodstone and a distinctive brand placard in 18k gold.

products.title: NATRONA BRACELET
products.description: Sturdy and sophisticated, designed with a Southwest sensibility, the Natrona Bracelet is a limited-edition expression of the classic arrowhead motif handcrafted from responsibly sourced precious metals. Replete with Art Deco subtlety, the bracelet includes our signature hairline engraved details, a startling 11MM gemstone cabochon, and a distinctive brand placard in Solid 18k gold.

products.title: NATRONA RING
products.description: The lone arrow of the Natrona Ring points the way to destinations unknown, like a single-minded compass meticulously handcrafted from sterling silver, the values of the artisan reflected in its bold volumes and hairline-engraved Art Deco details; the spirit of the American West glimpsed in its heroic 6MM cabochon of Lone Mountain turquoise; our commitment to craft gleaming from its distinctive bra

products.title: MONOGRAM ÉDITION: CIRCA SLIP CASE
products.description: Our original eyewear slip case, handcrafted in Italy using responsibly sourced leathers, with custom suede kidskin linings and signature embellishments.

products.title: MONOGRAM ÉDITION: CASSANDRE
products.description: Well-appointed bifold wallet handcrafted from natural calfskin, featuring two card slots, two interior slip pockets, with custom arrowhead adornment in Silver.

products.title: MONOGRAM ÉDITION: THEODORE
products.description: Limited-edition card holder handcrafted from natural calfskin, featuring three card slots and a flat pocket, with custom arrowhead adornment in Silver.

products.title: MONOGRAM ÉDITION: ELSTON
products.description: Luxuriant leather trifold wallet handcrafted from natural calfskin and finely embossed with our signature JMM monogram, featuring a unique four-slot design with a discreet folded-bill pocket, complemented by Silver metal corners with hairline-engraved arrowhead motif.

products.title: MONOGRAM ÉDITION: HUNTER
products.description: An elevated eyewear case handcrafted in Italy, equipped with matching, detachable leather strap and featuring custom suede kidskin linings and signature embellishments.

products.title: LANKASTER
products.description: A unisex, well balance, Saratoga-esque expression of classic '60s style

products.title: EL DORADO
products.description: A sharp shooter on the straight and narrow, you watch these dusty streets through rimless Ã¢â‚¬Ëœ30s-inspired spectacles, featuring high set temples and solid octagonal lenses, which silently remind observers that you are the fearless gun-for-hire, not the drunken deputy.

products.title: MOJAVE
products.description: The beauty of starkness, the rich artistry that leads to rarity, the somber and sumptuous expressions forged in the furnace of experience and time, mindfully manifested with elegance and eloquence in spectacles handcrafted to endure the haunting landscapes of heart and mind.

products.title: Langley Fox Cleaning Cloth - Howling Wolf
TORINO
products.description: Behold these big, bold, and distinctive frames inspired by the Teatro Regio Torino, a historic Italian theater famously redesigned by architect Carlo Mollino, who once declared, Everything is permissible as long as it is fantastic.

products.title: COLLECTOR'S TRAY LARGE
products.description: The Jacques Marie Mage collector eyewear tray is the absolute accessory to showcase your JMM collection. Handcrafted to Jacques Marie Mage specification in Italy out of cowhide signature burgundy leather, the tray holds 6 pairs of glasses/sunglasses.

products.title: WESTON RING
products.description: Horizons broaden when encountering this unique expression of the double-arrowhead motif, richly realized in the form of an alluring two-headed gap ring handcrafted from the finest sterling silver and/or 18k golds. products.title: NATRONA BRACELET

products.title: CUSTOM EYEWEAR BRIEFCASE
products.description: The Jacques Marie Mage custom eyewear briefcase is the perfect companion for your J.M.M collection or your travels. Handcrafted to Jacques Marie Mage specification in Jura, France out of cowhide burgundy leather, the briefcase hold six pair of glasses/sunglasses.

products.title: KRASNER
products.description: The same strength and inner rhythm that flows in the decisive abstractions of America’s great modernist painters find expression here in this amalgam of timeless style and nuanced gestures, a sophisticated and self-assured depiction with an artistic predilection.

products.title: WESLEY
products.description: Hot as a pistol, these charismatic collectibles are a reinterpretation of an original style from 2016. An elegant rectangular profile exquisitely updated with sculptural details and an exquisitely feathered wirecore design, these spectacles inspired by the folklore of the Old West are a plume proffered to the wind in humble appreciation.

products.title: WALKER
products.description: Think of all the bridges you could burn, all the love you'd surely earn, if only you could sing in bars strumming large guitars. Oh all the things you could express, all the people you'd impress, strutting your stuff, a real fast talker, wearing bold specs named for experimental singer Scott Walker.

products.title: STARCASTLE
products.description: Emerging from the brightest corners of the mind, these are intimate and audacious friends worth spending time with, to talk and unwind with, to envision what tomorrow might bring; an aesthetic presented as if in a dream, a dream trying to tell you something.

products.title: DEALAN 53
products.description: Throughout the mid-1960's, Bob Dylan toured the world with a sole companion: one pair of iconic, black, cat-eyed spectacles. The DEALAN pays homage to this unique relationship between a man and his eyewear, incorporating bold volumes and sharp lines that evoke the musician's devil-may-care charisma. Put these on, and don't look back.

products.title: JEFF
products.description: The newest release of our celebrated collaboration with iconic actor, jazz musician, and humble style provocateur Jeff Goldblum. Impeccably tailored and balanced, these collectible limited-edition glasses meld Mr. Goldblumâ€™s innate fashion sense and unique swagger with JMMâ€™s signature sophistication to create distinct glasses beaming with quirky charm and radical refinement.

products.title: SILVERTON
products.description: With its heart in the high country and its hopes in the big city, these new additions to the Rimless Series are an extraordinary expression of design and craftsmanship, comprised of a connected nose-and-brow bridge featuring contrasting precious metal embellishments and sculpted, acetate temples incorporating our signature wirecore designs.

products.title: NATRONA RING

products.title: ATIAN RING
products.description: This impressive ring of worshipful workmanship features a refined thunderbird head in stunning relief alongside an impressive cabochon of Lone Mountain turquoise secured within a Solid 18k Gold bezel. products.title: JAGGER
products.description: Beauty thrives beyond the club's velvet ropes, where the rhythm proves there's majesty in the mayhem. Wield your animal magnetism wisely in oversized aviators made for carousing in a crowd full of infectious energy and unbridled excess.

products.title: BESSET
products.description: The understated cool and turn-of-the-century minimalism of the late Carolyn Bessette-Kennedy informs the spirited sophistication of these petite, personality-packed spectacles, a feminine and fresh-faced homage to the legacy of one of the â€˜90s great fashion icons.

products.title: CIRCA LEATHER ENVELOPE
products.description: Keep your Collectible eyewear safe in a JMM protective leather pouch that will be the envy of all your accessories. Handcrafted from ethically sourced calf hide from Italy and features our custom crest branding.
